## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the [WordPress Coding Standards](https://developer.wordpress.org/coding-standards/wordpress-coding-standards/)
- [ ] I have used `declare(strict_types=1)` in new PHP files
- [ ] All user input is sanitized and all output is escaped
- [ ] Nonce verification is in place for all form handlers
- [ ] Capability checks are in place for all privileged actions
- [ ] All user-facing strings are translatable (using `__()`, `esc_html__()`, etc.)
- [ ] I have tested with PHP 8.0+ and the latest WordPress version
- [ ] I have tested the admin UI at 782px and 480px breakpoints
- [ ] This PR does not introduce any jQuery dependencies
